canonical_boundary: CH07 Rights Layer. Commercial and jieyuan functions isolated from ritual chain. No new lore. No Canon Gap fill.

asset_boundary.rights: L1 commercial layer; must not be sold as Relic or mixed into ritual closure.
asset_boundary.relic: Story progression asset; Rights must not unlock or replace Relic progression.
asset_boundary.rule: Rights records reference relic context but do not mutate Relic state.

rights.name: 章节结构预览
rights.description: 记念《回响之路》章节结构入口。用于查看探索动线与权益中心入口，不承载云门仪式链。

redemption.copy: 查看章节结构与活动入口。

rights.canonical_boundary: Preview only; no Canon expansion; no ritual-chain insertion.

rights.name: 权益礼遇 · 免费拿铁券
rights.description: 记念人间连接探索完成后，可在权益中心领取免费拿铁权益礼遇。探索完成后可免费领取，同账号仅可获得一次。

redemption.copy: 权益礼遇已开放：免费拿铁券（探索完成后可领）。

rights.canonical_boundary: L1 redemption only; separated from L3 relic echo at n3_human_connection.

rights.name: 权益礼遇 · 咖啡五折券
rights.description: 记念《回响之路》探索记念与心愿值记存达成后，可在权益中心查看咖啡五折券等权益礼遇。

redemption.copy: 你已积累足够心愿值，可在权益中心查看咖啡五折券等权益礼遇。

rights.canonical_boundary: Commercial follow-up only; not a chapter rank reward or Relic substitute.

rights.name: 章成分享资格
rights.description: 记念《回响之路》章成后，可生成分享海报。传播资产由用户主动生成，不写入信物持有库。

redemption.copy: 生成分享海报，或前往「我的信物」回顾记念。

rights.canonical_boundary: Routes to Digital Collectible flow; zero Relic progression effect.

rights.name: 我的卡券
rights.description: 记念权益中心中的卡券持有入口。用于查看已领取权益礼遇与核销状态，不替代信物档案。

redemption.copy: 卡券列表占位，未连接真实核销数据。

rights.canonical_boundary: Account surface only; isolated from Relic archive and ritual chain.
